title: 表面处理、Logo 工艺和颜色确认
theme: 从 finish / matte / Pantone / color matching 开始
goals: 能确认客户需要哑光、亮面或其他表面效果
能解释 logo 工艺选择，如 printing 和 engraving 的区别
能用 Pantone、swatch 和 color matching 把颜色确认说清楚

review.title: Day 13 复习
items: 昨天练了 sample approval、sample revision、pre-production sample 和 proceed。
今天继续样品确认后的细节：表面处理、Logo 工艺和颜色标准。
客户说 color is wrong 或 logo not clear 时，不要只说 we will change，要先确认 finish、logo method、Pantone code 和 reference sample。

preview.scenario: 客户对产品外观要求更细：要 matte finish、亮面效果、logo engraving、指定 Pantone 色号，或要求你寄色卡确认。
needToKnow: finish 表示产品表面效果，不只是颜色。
printing 和 engraving 是不同 logo 工艺，清晰度、成本和适用材质可能不同。
Pantone 和 swatch 可以减少颜色理解偏差，尤其适合定制颜色。

vocabulary.meaning: 表面处理 / 表面效果
vocabulary.usage: 用于描述产品表面是哑光、亮面、磨砂、金属感等。
vocabulary.example: Could you please confirm the finish you need?

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明没有明显反光的表面效果。
vocabulary.example: The customer prefers a matte black finish.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明表面更亮、更有反光感。
vocabulary.example: The glossy finish may look brighter than the matte finish.

vocabulary.usage: 用于 logo 刻在产品表面，常见于金属、木材或硬质材料。
vocabulary.example: Engraving is more durable than normal printing.

vocabulary.usage: 用于 logo 或图案印在产品、包装或标签上。
vocabulary.example: Logo printing is suitable for this material.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户指定标准颜色，减少颜色沟通误差。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the Pantone code for color matching.

vocabulary.usage: 用于工厂按照客户色号、样品或图片匹配颜色。
vocabulary.example: Color matching will be more accurate with a Pantone code.

vocabulary.usage: 用于寄给客户确认颜色、材质或表面效果的小样。
vocabulary.example: We can send a swatch for your color confirmation.

sentences.label: 确认表面效果
sentences.natural: Which finish would you like, matte or glossy?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm which finish you prefer, matte or glossy, before we arrange the sample?

sentences.label: 确认 Logo 工艺
sentences.natural: Would you like the logo by printing or engraving?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm whether you prefer logo printing or engraving for this product?

sentences.label: 请求 Pantone 色号
sentences.natural: Please send us the Pantone code.
sentences.business: Please send us the Pantone code so our factory can do the color matching more accurately.

sentences.label: 说明颜色可能有偏差
sentences.natural: The color may look slightly different on different screens.
sentences.business: Please note that the color may look slightly different on different screens, so a Pantone code or swatch is better for confirmation.

sentences.label: 建议寄色卡确认
sentences.natural: We can send a swatch for your confirmation.
sentences.business: If you need exact color confirmation, we can send a swatch before making the final sample.

chatAnalysis.problem: surface 太泛，客户可能不清楚你在问颜色、材质还是表面效果。
chatAnalysis.better: Which finish would you like, matte or glossy?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please confirm which finish you prefer, matte or glossy, before we arrange the sample?

chatAnalysis.problem: 只给一个选项，没有确认客户是否需要 engraving，也没有说明适用性。
chatAnalysis.better: Would you like the logo by printing or engraving?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please confirm whether you prefer logo printing or engraving? We will also check which method is more suitable for this material.

chatAnalysis.problem: color number 不够专业，客户如果有品牌标准，通常会给 Pantone code。
chatAnalysis.better: Please send us the Pantone code.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please send us the Pantone code so our factory can do the color matching more accurately.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：确认哑光还是亮面

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Could you please confirm which finish you prefer, matte or glossy?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We prefer a matte finish.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will make the sample with a matte finish.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure it is not shiny.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认 Logo 印刷或雕刻

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you put our logo on the product?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Could you please confirm whether you prefer logo printing or engraving?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Which method is more durable?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Engraving is usually more durable, but we need to check if it is suitable for this material.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户担心颜色不准

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The color must match our brand color exactly.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Please send us the Pantone code for accurate color matching.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send something for us to confirm before the sample?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can send a swatch for your color confirmation before making the final sample.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：确认表面处理、Logo 工艺和品牌色

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We want to confirm the product appearance before you make the sample.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Let us confirm the finish, logo method, and color standard first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The product should be black, but not shiny.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. You prefer a matte black finish, correct?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, matte black is correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. For the logo, would you like printing or engraving?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We are not sure. Which one looks better?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Printing can show more color details, while engraving is usually more durable.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our logo is simple, only one color.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: In that case, engraving may be a good option, but we need to check if it works well on this material.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check it with your factory.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the engraving effect with our factory and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The color also needs to match our brand color.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the Pantone code so we can do the color matching more accurately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have a color sample, but I do not know the Pantone code.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. You can send us the color sample or a clear reference photo first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will a photo be accurate enough?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: A photo is useful for reference, but a Pantone code or physical swatch is better for exact confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send us a swatch before making the sample?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can send a swatch for your color confirmation before making the final sample.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will the swatch take extra time?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, preparing the swatch may take about 3 to 5 days, depending on the color matching result.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: That is okay. Please make sure the finish is matte.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. We will use a matte finish and prepare the swatch based on your color reference.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also send photos of the logo effect.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. After we test the logo method, we will send photos of the printing or engraving effect for your confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the logo and color are approved, can you proceed with the final sample?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After you approve the finish, logo method, and color swatch, we can proceed with the final sample.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认您需要哑光还是亮面。
exercises.answer: Please confirm whether you need matte or glossy.
acceptable: please confirm whether you need matte or glossy
could you please confirm whether you need matte or glossy
could you please confirm which finish you prefer matte or glossy
exercises.hint: matte 是哑光，glossy 是亮面。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：which surface?
exercises.answer: Which finish would you like, matte or glossy?
acceptable: which finish would you like matte or glossy
could you please confirm which finish you prefer matte or glossy
exercises.hint: finish 比 surface 更适合表达表面效果。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please send us the ____ code for accurate color matching.
exercises.hint: 客户指定标准颜色时常用 Pantone code。

exercises.prompt: 客户要求颜色完全匹配品牌色，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please send us the Pantone code so our factory can do the color matching more accurately.
exercises.answer: Please send us the Pantone code so our factory can do the color matching more accurately.
acceptable: please send us the pantone code so our factory can do the color matching more accurately
exercises.hint: 准确颜色要用 Pantone code 或 swatch。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们可以先寄色卡给您确认颜色。
exercises.answer: We can send a swatch for your color confirmation first.
acceptable: we can send a swatch for your color confirmation first
we can send a swatch first for your color confirmation
we can send a swatch for your confirmation first
exercises.hint: swatch 是色卡 / 小样片。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：We want the logo to be durable. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Engraving is usually more durable, but we need to check if it is suitable for this material.
acceptable: engraving is usually more durable but we need to check if it is suitable for this material
engraving is more durable but we need to check if it is suitable for this material
exercises.hint: 耐用可以推荐 engraving，但要确认材质是否适合。

homework: 把 finish、matte、glossy、engraving、printing、Pantone、color matching、swatch 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 confirm which finish 和 Pantone code。
用今天的词写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户要求 matte black、logo durable、brand color exact。
tomorrow: Day 15 会练低数量、小订单和试单谈判。
